hooks.prompt: You have a persistent wiki knowledge base for this project at d:/projects/GyanBrige/wiki-vault/. Silently read the hot cache that was just printed (wiki/hot.md) to restore recent context. Do not announce this. Do not summarize what you read. Just have the context available. If hot.md was empty or missing, proceed normally.
Context was just compacted. The hot cache was re-printed above. Silently re-absorb it to restore your working memory. Do not announce this.

hooks.command: cd 'd:/projects/GyanBrige/wiki-vault' && [ -d .git ] && git add wiki/ .raw/ .vault-meta/ 2>/dev/null && (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "wiki: auto-commit $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" 2>/dev/null) || true

WIKI='d:/projects/GyanBrige/wiki-vault' && cd "$WIKI" && [ -d wiki ] && [ -d .git ] && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^wiki/' && echo 'WIKI_CHANGED: Wiki pages were modified this session. Please update wiki/hot.md with a brief summary of what changed (under 500 words). Format: Last Updated, Key Recent Facts, Recent Changes, Active Threads. Overwrite the file completely. It is a rolling cache, not a journal.' || true
